title: Validate PMTiles directory and representative tile payloads
goal: Add a bounded validator that opens every regional Weltgewebe PMTiles archive, verifies its internal directory and metadata, and decodes representative vector tiles so corruption beyond magic bytes, size and SHA-256 is detected before publication.

acceptance.assertion: Each declared regional PMTiles archive can be opened by an independent PMTiles reader and its root and leaf directory structure is internally consistent.
A deterministic bounded sample across archive bounds and zoom levels yields decodable MVT payloads with the expected OpenMapTiles source-layer contract.
acceptance.verifier: regional PMTiles sample manifest and decoder receipt

acceptance.assertion: Truncated, directory-corrupt and malformed vector-tile fixtures fail the validator before publication.
The existing regional content-proof jobs invoke the bounded deep validator in addition to hash, magic-byte and HTTP Range checks.
acceptance.verifier: GitHub Actions run bound to the implementing PR head

metadata.gap: Current proof establishes pinned input, artifact hash, PMTiles signature and HTTP Range delivery, but not internal directory or representative tile-payload integrity.
